mission_statement: Glean aims to empower employees to do their best work by unifying organizational intelligence with AI, providing instant access to relevant information and automating workflows.

core_products.name: Glean Assistant
core_products.description: A personal AI assistant designed for data analysis, deep research, Canvas, and companion tasks, leveraging company-wide context.

core_products.name: Glean Agents
core_products.description: A platform to build, manage, govern, and orchestrate autonomous AI agents for enterprise workflows, ensuring secure and reliable operation.

core_products.name: Glean Search
core_products.description: The foundational enterprise AI search solution that provides intelligent, permission-aware results across all connected company data sources using an Enterprise Graph.

core_products.name: Glean Protect
core_products.description: Features and architecture built to safely scale AI at work, prioritizing security, privacy, and compliance from day one.

target_markets.ideal_customer_profile: Large enterprises with complex, distributed knowledge ecosystems, a strategic focus on operationalizing AI, and a need to improve employee productivity, accelerate onboarding, and streamline information access across 100+ applications.

sales_triggers.recent_news: Glean announced it surpassed $200M in ARR for Enterprise AI, doubling revenue in nine months, and launched Glean Apps, Glean Actions, and Glean APIs in March 2026.
sales_triggers.strategic_priorities: Scaling AI infrastructure and agent capabilities, deepening enterprise deployments, enhancing security and governance for AI, improving employee productivity and onboarding efficiency, and transforming data into strategic advantage through AI.

impact_metrics.result: Saved 15,000+ hours a month, addressed information sprawl, and led to higher productivity.
Saved 1,500+ hours monthly and onboarded employees 20% faster.
Deployed over 3,400 specialized AI agents across critical workflows within months.

green_flags: Rapid growth: Surpassed $200M ARR, doubling revenue in 9 months, indicating strong market demand and product-market fit.
Strategic focus on AI agents and custom AI apps: Recently launched Glean Apps, Actions, and APIs, showing innovation and expansion beyond core search.
Strong enterprise adoption: Proven success with large customers like Confluent, Zillow, Super.com, demonstrating ability to handle complex enterprise environments.
red_flags: Opaque pricing model: Pricing is per-user, per-month, but not publicly disclosed, requiring a sales process and potentially a significant upfront Proof of Concept (POC) payment.

High setup effort and potential high Total Cost of Ownership (TCO): Competitor reviews suggest significant setup effort and higher TCO compared to alternatives, especially for infrastructure and operational requirements.
Limited actionability beyond search: While strong in knowledge discovery, some teams may outgrow it when needing execution and automation beyond just answers.

buyer_roles.title: VP of Engineering
daily_pain_points: Developers struggling to find relevant code, documentation, or internal knowledge across disparate systems, slowing down development cycles.
Ensuring secure and governed deployment of custom AI agents and applications without creating new security vulnerabilities.
Slow onboarding of new engineers due to difficulty accessing essential knowledge and resources.
typical_objections: We already have internal search tools, they're good enough.
Our security team is hesitant about new AI integrations.
We're focused on core product development, not building internal tools.

buyer_roles.title: Head of IT / CIO
daily_pain_points: Managing information sprawl across 100+ enterprise applications, leading to data silos and inefficient knowledge retrieval.
Ensuring data security, privacy, and compliance (e.g., GDPR, SOC 2) across all AI-powered systems and data access points.
High operational overhead and cost associated with maintaining disparate internal knowledge systems and supporting employee search queries.
typical_objections: We have a strict budget for new enterprise software this year.
Integration with our existing legacy systems will be too complex.
We're concerned about vendor lock-in and data portability.

buyer_roles.title: Chief People Officer / Head of HR
daily_pain_points: New hires taking too long to become productive due to difficulty finding company policies, benefits info, or team-specific knowledge.
Employees spending excessive time searching for internal information, impacting overall productivity and engagement.
Lack of a centralized, intelligent system to manage and disseminate critical HR and company knowledge effectively.
typical_objections: We're prioritizing other HR tech initiatives right now.
Our current intranet/knowledge base is sufficient.
We don't see a clear ROI for an AI search platform in HR.

outbound_hooks.specific_signal: Glean announced it surpassed $200M in ARR for Enterprise AI, doubling revenue in nine months, and shipped 200 new features including Glean Agents (March 2026).
outbound_hooks.why_now: This significant revenue growth and product innovation signals a strong strategic focus on scaling enterprise AI and a potential need for robust infrastructure to support this rapid expansion.
outbound_hooks.source_or_evidence: Glean Press Release / Yahoo Finance: 'Glean Surpasses $200M in ARR for Enterprise AI, Doubling Revenue in Nine Months' (March 2026)

outbound_hooks.specific_signal: Glean launched Glean Apps, Glean Actions, and Glean APIs, enabling businesses to build and deploy secure, customized generative AI experiences grounded in their enterprise data (March 2026).
outbound_hooks.why_now: This launch indicates a push towards empowering customers to build custom AI solutions, which often creates new needs for data governance, security, and integration support.
outbound_hooks.source_or_evidence: Glean Blog: 'Introducing Glean Apps and APIs: Build custom generative AI agents securely at scale' (March 2026)

outbound_hooks.specific_signal: Glean CEO Arvind Jain stated that AI startups prioritize adaptability and AI-tool fluency over strict resumes when hiring, testing candidates' AI usage and startup intensity (March 2026).
outbound_hooks.why_now: This focus on AI-tool fluency and adaptability in hiring suggests a company-wide commitment to leveraging AI, which could mean they are actively looking for solutions to enhance AI adoption and skill development internally.
outbound_hooks.source_or_evidence: Let's Data Science: 'AI Startups Prioritize Adaptability Over Resumes' (March 2026, referencing Business Insider)

buyer_messaging.value_prop: Help your engineering teams accelerate development and onboarding by providing instant, secure access to all critical technical knowledge and code context.
buyer_messaging.pain_to_solution: You're dealing with engineers wasting time searching for scattered documentation and code snippets — Glean's Enterprise Graph and AI Search fixes this by unifying all technical knowledge with permission-aware access.
buyer_messaging.expected_outcome: Reduced new hire ramp-up time by 20%, increased developer productivity, and faster time-to-market for new features.
buyer_messaging.opening_hook: Saw the news about Glean hitting $200M ARR and launching new APIs for custom AI agents – that's huge for engineering teams looking to build securely.

buyer_messaging.value_prop: Streamline IT operations and ensure robust data governance and compliance across your entire enterprise AI ecosystem.
buyer_messaging.pain_to_solution: You're dealing with the complexity of managing information sprawl and ensuring compliance across 100+ apps — Glean's secure, permission-aware platform fixes this by centralizing knowledge access and enforcing data policies.
buyer_messaging.expected_outcome: Reduced operational costs, enhanced data security posture, and simplified compliance audits for AI initiatives.
buyer_messaging.opening_hook: Given Glean's rapid growth to $200M ARR and your focus on enterprise AI, I imagine scaling secure data access across all your systems is a top priority for IT.

buyer_messaging.role_title: Chief People Officer / Head of HR
buyer_messaging.value_prop: Enhance employee experience and accelerate productivity from day one by providing a single source of truth for all company knowledge.
buyer_messaging.pain_to_solution: You're dealing with new hires struggling to find essential company information, slowing their productivity — Glean's AI-powered knowledge platform fixes this by providing instant, personalized answers to their questions.
buyer_messaging.expected_outcome: 20% faster new hire onboarding, increased employee satisfaction, and hundreds of hours saved monthly on information retrieval.
buyer_messaging.opening_hook: I noticed Glean's CEO, Arvind Jain, recently emphasized adaptability and AI-tool fluency in hiring – which makes me think about how quickly new employees can access the knowledge they need to be effective.
